title: Create: Strict Links
description: Makes Create Redstone Link frequencies respect data components (NBT), for more frequency diversity and even password protection via named items or written books.
body:
Makes the [Create Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) Redstone Link frequencies take data components (NBT) into account, allowing for more frequency diversity and even password protection via named items or written books.
![Banner image showing off how items with different NBT data component tags have distinct Create Mod Redstone Link frequencies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/the-drunken-cod/Create-Strict-Links/refs/heads/1.21.1/.github/assets/banner.png)
